fields.name: Row Ref. No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a row reference number for the analysis line.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description for the analysis line.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of totaling for the analysis line. The type determines which items within the totaling range that you specify in the Range field will be totaled.

fields.name: Range
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number or formula of the type to use to calculate the total for this line.

fields.name: New Page
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want a page break after the current line when you print the analysis report.

fields.name: Show
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether you want the analysis line to be included when you print the report.

fields.name: Bold
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want the amounts on this line to be printed in bold.

fields.name: Italic
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want the amounts in this line to be printed in italics.

fields.name: Underline
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want the amounts in this line to be underlined when printed.

fields.name: Show Opposite Sign
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want sales and negative adjustments to be shown as positive amounts and purchases and positive adjustments to be shown as negative amounts.

fields.name: Dimension 1 Totaling
fields.tooltip: Specifies which dimension value amounts will be totaled on this line.

fields.name: Dimension 2 Totaling
fields.tooltip: Specifies which dimension value amounts will be totaled on this line. If the type on the line is Formula, this field must be blank. Also, if you do not want the amounts on the line to be filtered by dimensions, this field must be blank.

fields.name: Dimension 3 Totaling
fields.tooltip: Specifies which dimension value amounts will be totaled on this line. If the type on the line is Formula, this field must be blank. Also, if you do not want the amounts on the line to be filtered by dimensions, this field must be blank.

fields.name: Indentation
fields.tooltip: Specifies the indentation of the line.
